zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Sutton於大約1358年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Thomas Sutton44歲，母親Agnes de Hotham40歲。她於1379年之前與Ralph Hastings結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1398年在英國越可爾約克約克 卡素享年41歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可梅爾敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Sutton于大约1358年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Sutton44岁，母亲Agnes de Hotham40岁。她于1379年之前与Ralph Hastings结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1398年在英国越可爾約克約克 卡素享年41岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可梅爾敦。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Sutton was born about 1358, in England, her father, Sir Thomas Sutton, was 44 and her mother, Agnes de Hotham, was 40. She married Ralph Hastings before 1379. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1398, in York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Melton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Sutton est née environ 1358, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Sutton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Hotham, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Hastings avant 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1398, à York Castle, York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Melton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Sutton um 1358 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Sutton 44 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Hotham 40. Sie hat vor 1379 Ralph Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1398 im Alter von 41 Jahren in York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Melton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Sutton è nata il circa 1358 nel England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Sutton, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Hotham, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Hastings prima del 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1398, nel York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Melton, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Suttonが約1358年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Suttonは44歳，母Agnes de Hothamは40歳であった。1379年以前にRalph Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1398年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークヨーク カストルで41歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクメルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Sutton(이)가 대략 1358년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Sutton(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Hotham(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1379년 이전 Ralph Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 영국 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 카스틀에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 멜턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Sutton nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Sutton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Hotham, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Hastings antes 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1398, em York Castle, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Melton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Sutton родилась около 1358 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Sutton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Hotham, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Hastings перед 1379 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1398 г. в местности ерк кастл, ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности мелтон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Sutton nació aproximadamente 1358, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Sutton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnes de Hotham, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Ralph Hastings antes de 1379. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1398, en York Castle, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Melton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
